02 / Desert

Silence in
the sand.

Riads, spice markets, and firelit evenings under a cold desert sky.

06 days From $1,820 Host Imani 5 seats left

Morocco

Start in the city tangle — markets, mint tea, doors within doors — then leave it for sand that stretches until your thoughts get quieter.

Imani sets a pace that protects the magic: enough time in the medina to get lost on purpose, enough nights under desert sky to remember why you came.

Day 01
Arrive soft

Settle into Sand Riad. Courtyard shade, clay walls, first walk at dusk.

Day 02
City pulse

Markets with Imani — not a checklist, a conversation between stalls.

Day 03–04
Into the sand

Desert camp, firelit dinners, silence that actually feels full.

Day 05
Feast slowly

Back through oasis towns. One long table. One slow evening.

Day 06
Leave lighter

Morning mint tea and a transfer that refuses to hustle.

Trip details

  • Length06 days
  • From$1,820
  • HostImani
  • StaySand Riad
  • DatesApr 2–7 · 2026
  • Seats5 seats left

beyond Morocco.
